media.ext_alt_text: This artwork is an abstract painting, the painting displays a figure with blurred and distorted features standing in a mix of vibrant colors and textures such as yellow, blue, red and beige. Elements of nature such as flowers are also integrated into compositions that create a sense of emotion.
